parsed_output.justification: Justin explicitly claimed to be the Werewolf and mentioned seeing the Insomniac in the center, which is consistent with the Werewolf's ability when alone. Furthermore, Paul (Troublemaker) and Eric (Robber) both confirmed they did not swap or steal from Justin, meaning his starting role would be his final role.
